data.body:
Here's a breakdown of Democratic performance in special elections since 2025:

Since Jan 2025, there have been 117 state legislative special elections. Of the 96 that resulted in general elections, Dems won 67 and GOP won 29. 

Democrats won approximately 70% of those contested races. Ballotpedia
